summary: Comprehensive testing of Weekly Tasks System completed. All 34 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI flows verified for Admin Tasks tab, Student Profile page, and social item reservation functionality.

issues: React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - caused by Visual Editor wrapper spans. Does not affect functionality but could impact SSR/hydration. Same issue from iteration_2.

passed_tests: GET /api/tasks/types - Returns all 4 task types (adhan, speech, activity, social)
GET /api/tasks/social-items - Returns all 4 social items (قهوة, شاي, حلى, سمبوسة)
POST /api/tasks/distribute - Creates 16 tasks (4 tasks x 4 teams)
GET /api/tasks/active - Returns active tasks, reservations, dinners with week info
GET /api/tasks/team/:teamId - Returns team-specific tasks correctly
PUT /api/tasks/:taskId/assign - Admin assigns student to task (adhan/speech)
PUT /api/tasks/invalid-id/assign - Returns 404 for invalid task ID
POST /api/tasks/social/reserve - Student successfully reserves social item
POST /api/tasks/social/reserve - Same student cannot reserve twice (returns 400)
POST /api/tasks/social/reserve - Same item cannot be reserved twice in same team (returns 400)
POST /api/tasks/social/reserve - Invalid item returns 400
POST /api/tasks/special-dinner - Admin creates special dinner with/without student assignment
DELETE /api/tasks/special-dinner/:id - Admin deletes dinner
DELETE /api/tasks/clear - Clears all active tasks
Admin PIN Protection - Wrong PIN (123456) rejected with error message
Admin PIN Protection - Correct PIN (171920) accepted
Admin Tasks Tab - Displays distributed tasks per team
Admin Tasks Tab - Shows assignment dropdowns for adhan/speech tasks
Admin Tasks Tab - Social items display reservation status with student names
Admin Tasks Tab - Special dinner creation form works
Admin Team Points Button - Opens team points dialog with positive/deduction/custom tabs
Admin Individual Points - Opens student points dialog with all categories
Student Profile Page - Shows weekly tasks section
Student Profile Page - Displays 4 task types for their team
Student Profile Page - Social items show correct status (reserved/available)
Student Profile Page - Can reserve available social item (click updates UI immediately)
Student Profile Page - Reserved items disabled for student who already reserved
Student Profile Page - Shows 'اختيارك ✓' for student's own reservation
critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warning in table components persists from previous iteration - caused by Visual Editor wrapper spans. Consider removing debug wrappers in production build.
seed_data_creation: Social item reservation created during testing: مسفر الوادعي reserved حلى (dessert) for sadara team
context_for_next_testing_agent: Weekly tasks system fully functional. 16 tasks distributed (4 per team). Current reservations in sadara team: قهوة (محمد عبد الوهاب), شاي (أنس الوادعي), حلى (مسفر الوادعي). سمبوسة still available. All APIs tested and working. Admin can assign students to adhan/speech tasks, create special dinners. Students can reserve one social item per week.

task_distribution.get_active_tasks: PASS - Returns tasks, reservations, dinners, week

task_assignment.assign_to_student: PASS - Admin assigns student via PUT /api/tasks/:id/assign
task_assignment.team_tasks: PASS - GET /api/tasks/team/:teamId returns 4 tasks per team

social_reservation.reserve_item: PASS - Student reserves item via POST /api/tasks/social/reserve
social_reservation.duplicate_student_prevention: PASS - Same student cannot reserve twice
social_reservation.duplicate_item_prevention: PASS - Same item cannot be reserved by different student in same team

special_dinner.create_dinner: PASS - Admin creates dinner via POST /api/tasks/special-dinner
special_dinner.delete_dinner: PASS - Admin deletes dinner via DELETE /api/tasks/special-dinner/:id

admin_ui.pin_protection: PASS - Wrong PIN rejected, correct PIN accepted
admin_ui.tasks_tab: PASS - Shows distributed tasks with assignment dropdowns
admin_ui.team_points: PASS - Team points dialog opens with categories
admin_ui.individual_points: PASS - Student points dialog opens with categories

student_ui.weekly_tasks_display: PASS - Shows 4 task types for student's team
student_ui.reserve_item_click: PASS - Clicking available item reserves it
student_ui.reservation_disabled: PASS - Student who reserved cannot reserve again
